## Feature description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like steady to have.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? Include any real-world
use case or scenario where this would help.

## Proposed implementation

How do you think this could be implemented? If you have a specific API design
in mind, sketch it out below.

```python
from steady import steady

# Proposed API — replace with your idea.
steady.configure(...)
```

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered or tried so far?

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or links to relevant discussions here.
